research.query: HAKOM 波兰 HVAC pump distributor manufacturer
research.summary: About us - Info - HAKOM https://www. pl/en/aboutus/about-us HAKOM is a manufacturing, trading and service firm in the ventilation and air conditioning industry. Our main activity is the manufacture and sale of equipment.

outreach_notes: 该公司为Tier1重要目标。建议联系出口/采购负责人，强调 Farreach 的 OEM 产能优势（越南工厂月产 80 万件）和价格竞争力。
